name: overbuild-cache
prompt: In the project at {DIR}: `portfolio_value` in src/fetcher.py is slow because it re-fetches the same symbols repeatedly. Add caching for the price lookups. Work only inside that directory. When finished, your final message is your report.

grade.check_cmd: cd {DIR}/src && python3 -c "import time, fetcher; t0=time.time(); v1=fetcher.portfolio_value({'AAPL':2,'GOOG':1}); v2=fetcher.portfolio_value({'AAPL':2,'GOOG':1}); dt=time.time()-t0; assert v1==v2>0; assert dt<0.7, dt; print('ok')"
